description:
**Milestone:** Phase 5: Enterprise Features

Complete theming toolkit for rebranding Helix components. CLI command (helix theme generate) that produces a full token override package from brand colors. Zero-JavaScript theming via data-theme attribute.

**Files to Modify:**
- packages/cli/src/commands/theme.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] helix theme generate CLI command
- [ ] Brand color input → full token package output
- [ ] Preview mode to visualize theme before committing
- [ ] Theme package publishable to npm
- [ ] Documentation for enterprise white-labeling

**Complexity:** large
title: Build white-labeling toolkit and theme CLI
